scanType: URGENT: New direct competitor detected - OmenX
summary: OmenX announced multi-million dollar angel round AND public testnet launch on March 30, 2026. Claims 'industry-first leveraged prediction market' (false; LEVER and Ultramarkets exist). Targeting Base mainnet (same chain as LEVER).
Investors: Paramita VC, Penrose Ventures, M77 Ventures, plus CEX founders. This is real funding, not a side project.
Product: perpetual-style mechanics for prediction markets. Leverage for conviction amplification. Enter/exit instantly. Points system for testnet incentivization. Live at alpha.omenx.com.

LEVER competitive landscape has changed dramatically in 48 hours: Ultramarkets confirmed live (900+ users), OmenX announced funded testnet on Base. THREE funded leveraged prediction market protocols now competing. First to mainnet on Base gains narrative advantage.
OmenX's 'industry-first' PR claim is a direct challenge. LEVER should counter this publicly and accelerate mainnet timeline.

competitiveLandscapeUpdate.race_status: THREE-WAY RACE. Ultramarkets has first-mover. OmenX has PR narrative ('industry-first'). LEVER has superior architecture (50x, ERC-4626, continuous risk curves, deterministic fees). First to Base mainnet wins the narrative.

workstreamTags.CEO: CRITICAL COMPETITIVE ALERT: OmenX launched funded testnet on Base yesterday, claiming 'industry-first leveraged prediction market.' This is a direct challenge. THREE protocols now competing (Ultramarkets live, OmenX testnet, LEVER testnet). LEVER must (1) counter the 'industry-first' claim, (2) accelerate mainnet, (3) use Prediction Conference (April 22-24) to establish positioning. The architectural advantages (50x vs 10x, ERC-4626, continuous risk curves) are meaningless if we are third to market.
workstreamTags.BUILD: URGENCY UPGRADED: OmenX launched funded testnet on Base (same chain) on March 30. They are targeting Base mainnet. LEVER must accelerate mainnet readiness. The ERC-4626 vault, dual oracle, and 16-contract architecture are differentiators, but only if deployed.
workstreamTags.ADVISOR: Competitive landscape shifted from 'LEVER is the only leveraged prediction market' to 'three-way race.' Ultramarkets (live, 900 users), OmenX (funded testnet, Base), LEVER (testnet, best architecture). Strategy must shift from 'unique product' to 'best implementation, fastest to Base mainnet.' Counter OmenX's 'industry-first' PR claim immediately.
